description: Complete walkthrough covering Volcano Manor questline, all missable Leyndell Royal Capital items, Goldmask/Corhyn quest, Millicent progression, Morgott boss, Nepheli quest completion, Yura/Shabriri, and wrapping up Volcano Manor including Rya, Patches, and Tanith.

steps.title: Do NOT Defeat Rykard Until Instructed
steps.description: Defeating Rykard locks you out of all incomplete Volcano Manor quests. Avoid at all costs until told otherwise.

steps.title: Speak with Ghost NPC in West Hallway
steps.description: There is a ghost NPC at the end of the west hallway. Speaking with it provides context on Volcano Manor's story. It disappears after eliminating the first target.

steps.title: Defeat Inquisitor Ghiza Upstairs – Ghiza's Wheel
steps.description: Before speaking with Tanith, head upstairs to fight Inquisitor Ghiza. She drops the Ghiza's Wheel weapon.

steps.title: Speak with Tanith – Join Volcano Manor
steps.description: Speak with Tanith and agree to join Volcano Manor. Joining has no negative impact elsewhere in the game.

steps.title: Greet NPCs in the Drawing-Room: Rya, Bernahl, Diallos
steps.description: Head down the hallway to the Drawing-Room. Speak with Rya, Bernahl, and Diallos.

steps.title: Pick Up Recusant's Finger and First Letter from Volcano Manor
steps.description: Pick up the Recusant's Finger and the first Letter from Volcano Manor. It names Old Knight Istvan as the target, north of Warmaster's Shack.

steps.title: Invade and Defeat Old Knight Istvan – Scaled Armor Set
steps.description: Travel to the location north of Warmaster's Shack. Find the Red Summoning Sign and invade. Defeat Istvan for the Scaled Armor Set.

steps.title: Report Success to Tanith – Magma Shot Sorcery
steps.description: Report your success to Tanith. Receive the Magma Shot Sorcery.

steps.title: Reload – Find Rya as Zorayas in New Room
steps.description: Reload the game. Find Rya in a new room (down the hall, second door on the right). She is in her true serpent-born form. Speak through all dialogue.

steps.title: Speak with Tanith for New Dialogue
steps.description: Optionally speak with Tanith for additional new dialogue.

steps.title: Purchase New Ashes of War from Bernahl
steps.description: Speak with Bernahl. He now sells new Ashes of War, including Assassin's Gambit (semi-invisible and silent for ~30 seconds).

steps.title: Speak with Patches – Get Target Request for Tragoth
steps.description: Speak with Patches and get a target request for the Great Horned Tragoth.

steps.title: Invade and Defeat Great Horned Tragoth – Bull-Goat Armor Set
steps.description: Fast travel to the Magma Wyrm Makar arena. Find the Red Summoning Sign near the grace. Invade and defeat Tragoth for the Bull-Goat Armor Set.

steps.title: Report Success to Patches
steps.description: Return to Patches and inform him about your success.

steps.title: Reload and Speak with Patches – Magma Whip Candlestick
steps.description: Reload the game and speak with Patches again to receive the Magma Whip Candlestick.

phases.title: Second Volcano Manor Target – Rileigh the Idle

steps.title: Pick Up Second Letter from Volcano Manor
steps.description: Retrieve the second Letter from Volcano Manor. The target is Rileigh the Idle.

steps.title: Invade and Defeat Rileigh the Idle – Crepus's Vial Talisman
steps.description: Travel north from Erdtree Gazing Hill through the ravine. Find the Red Summoning Sign and invade. Defeat Rileigh for the Crepus's Vial Talisman.

phases.title: Shaded Castle – Valkyrie's Prosthesis & Legendary Armament

steps.title: Defeat Maleigh Marais West of Shaded Castle
steps.description: Before entering the Shaded Castle, find Maleigh Marais to the west. Defeat her for the Antspur Rapier, Marais Mask, and Robe.

steps.title: Discover Shaded Castle Ramparts Site of Grace
steps.description: Enter the Shaded Castle near a break in the wall. Discover the site of grace at the Ramparts.

steps.title: Pick Up Valkyrie's Prosthesis (Northwest Corner)
steps.description: Head to the northwest corner of the Shaded Castle and pick up the Valkyrie's Prosthesis (needed for Millicent's quest).

steps.title: Reach Shaded Castle Inner Gate Site of Grace
steps.description: Double back and hop across rooftops to the north to reach the Inner Gate site of grace.

steps.title: Defeat Elemer of the Briar – Marais Executioner's Sword (Legendary)
steps.description: Make your way to the Castellan's Hall. Defeat Elemer of the Briar for the Briar Greatshield and Marais Executioner's Sword (legendary armament).

steps.title: Discover Castellan's Hall Site of Grace
steps.description: Discover the new site of grace at the Castellan's Hall.

steps.title: Report Rileigh's Elimination to Tanith – Serpentbone Blade
steps.description: Report your success to Tanith. Receive the Serpentbone Blade. She also reveals Volcano Manor's secrets.

steps.title: Speak with Diallos – Doubt and Self-Pity
steps.description: Reload and go to the Drawing-Room. Speak with Diallos through all his dialogue expressing doubt.

steps.title: Pick Up Red Letter (Third Letter) – Diallos Leaves
steps.description: Pick up the Red Letter (third Volcano Manor letter). This causes Diallos to leave the manor.

steps.title: Get Letter to Bernahl – Target: Vargram in Leyndell
steps.description: Speak with Bernahl to receive the Letter to Bernahl. It marks target Vargram the Raging Wolf in Leyndell.

steps.title: Speak with Rya (Human Form) Through All Dialogue
steps.description: Find Rya in the same room as before, now in human form. Speak through all dialogue.

phases.title: Rya's Quest – Dark Side of Volcano Manor

steps.title: Find False Wall to Prison Town Church
steps.description: Open the door to the room right of Rya's room. Find a false wall near a Perfume Bottle (dodge-roll into it). Make your way southwest to the Prison Town Church site of grace.

steps.title: Step Outside Church – Tell Rya of the Dark Side
steps.description: Open the doors at the far side of the church and step out into the underbelly. Speak with Rya and 'Tell her of the dark side of Volcano Manor'.

steps.title: Ask Tanith About Zorayas's Troubles
steps.description: Optionally speak with Tanith about 'Zorayas's troubles' for new dialogue.

steps.title: Make Your Way to the Guest Hall
steps.description: From the Prison Town Church, navigate through the underbelly to reach the Guest Hall.

steps.title: Travel Through Lava and Take Lift to Temple of Eiglay
steps.description: From the Guest Hall, go through the lava and take a lift up towards the Temple of Eiglay.

steps.title: Pull Lever to Raise Bridge Shortcut
steps.description: Before entering the temple, pull the lever to the northwest to raise a giant bridge — shortcut back to the Prison Town Church.

steps.title: Defeat Godskin Noble – Godskin Stitcher & Noble Presence
steps.description: Face the Godskin Noble in the temple. Drops the Godskin Stitcher and Noble Presence Incantation.

steps.title: Discover Temple of Eiglay Site of Grace
steps.description: Discover the new site of grace at the Temple of Eiglay.

steps.title: Pick Up Serpent's Amnion from Altar
steps.description: Grab the Serpent's Amnion from the altar in the temple.

phases.title: Rya's Quest – Amnion & Tonic of Forgetfulness

steps.title: Give Rya the Serpent's Amnion
steps.description: Return to Rya and give her the Serpent's Amnion. Speak through all dialogue.

steps.title: Reload – Rya Vanishes
steps.description: Reload the game. Rya has vanished.

steps.title: Ask Tanith About Zorayas's Absence – Receive Tonic of Forgetfulness
steps.description: Speak to Tanith about 'Zorayas's absence'. Speak again to receive the Tonic of Forgetfulness.

phases.title: Finding Rya Deeper in Volcano Manor

steps.title: Return to Temple of Eiglay – Take South Lift Deeper
steps.description: Return to the Temple of Eiglay. Use the lift to the south to go deeper into Volcano Manor.

steps.title: Don't Accidentally Give Rya the Tonic
steps.description: When you speak with Rya next, the Tonic option is the first/top choice. Be careful not to select it by accident.

steps.title: Navigate to Rya's New Location
steps.description: Sneak past the Iron Maiden (Assassin's Gambit helps). Continue west, up stairs, activate the lift shortcut, then jump over the railing at the end of the bridge to land near Rya's room.

steps.title: Speak with Rya – Choose to Do Nothing (Best Ending)
steps.description: Rya asks you to end her life. Options: kill her, give the Tonic, or do nothing. Doing nothing is the only option that gives a hopeful ending and Zorayas's Letter. Don't decide now — one more chance after Rykard.

steps.title: Open Fog Wall with 2 Stonesword Keys
steps.description: Continue through the manor to a fog wall requiring two Stonesword Keys.

steps.title: Pick Up Seedbed Curse
steps.description: Make your way to the bottom floor (Assassin's Gambit helps). Head southwest to find the Seedbed Curse.

steps.title: Pick Up Royal Knight's Resolve Ash of War
steps.description: At the opposite side of this area, find the Royal Knight's Resolve Ash of War and a direct exit back to the Volcano Manor hub.

steps.title: Give Millicent the Valkyrie's Prosthesis
steps.description: Fast travel to Erdtree Gazing Hill. Find Millicent on the hill to the northeast. Give her the Valkyrie's Prosthesis and speak through all dialogue.

steps.title: Return to Gowry for New Dialogue About Millicent
steps.description: Optionally return to Gowry for new dialogue about Millicent.

steps.title: Buy Pest Threads Incantation from Gowry
steps.description: Purchase the Pest Threads Incantation from Gowry.

steps.title: Choose 'About Malenia' – 'Desperate Prayer'
steps.description: Buying Pest Threads opens the 'About Malenia' dialogue option, which unlocks the 'Desperate Prayer' gesture.

steps.title: Summon Millicent at Windmill Village
steps.description: Head to Windmill Village in north Altus Plateau. Near the high point, find Millicent's summoning sign.

steps.title: Defeat Godskin Apostle – Godskin Peeler
steps.description: Defeat the Godskin Apostle up the hill (with Millicent's help). Drops Scouring Black Flames Incantation and Godskin Peeler.

steps.title: Speak with Millicent at Windmill Village Grace
steps.description: Discover and rest at the new grace. Find Millicent nearby and speak through all dialogue. She'll next appear in the Mountaintops.

phases.title: Bell Bearing Hunter – Hermit Merchant's Shack

steps.title: Defeat Bell Bearing Hunter – Medicine Peddler's Bell Bearing
steps.description: Travel to the Hermit Merchant's Shack in the outskirts of Leyndell. Rest, pass time to night, reload. The merchant disappears and the Hunter attacks. Hardest version yet. Drops Medicine Peddler's Bell Bearing.

steps.title: All Surface Leyndell Items Disappear After Maliketh
steps.description: The entire surface level of Leyndell becomes unavailable after defeating Maliketh. Get all unique items now.

steps.title: Pick Up Seedbed Curse and Perfume Bottle (East Capital Ramparts)
steps.description: From the East Capital Ramparts, pick up a Perfume Bottle and Seedbed Curse in the upper floors past the first lift.

steps.title: Farm Envoy's Long Horn
steps.description: (4% Drop Rate) The Large Oracle Envoy along the way can drop the Envoy's Long Horn weapon (4% base drop rate). This enemy won't spawn after Maliketh.

steps.title: Pick Up Imp Head (Corpse) Armor
steps.description: From Avenue Balcony, double back southeast, then northeast down the avenue. At the end, turn south to the alley's end for the Imp Head (Corpse) armor.

steps.title: Pick Up Black Bow
steps.description: Cross the avenue, pass a fountain, descend on a second lift. Sprint-jump across rooftops west to find the Black Bow on a body.

steps.title: Pick Up Cracked Pot
steps.description: Jump off and head through the archway west. Find a Cracked Pot to your left.

steps.title: Reach Lower Capital Church Site of Grace
steps.description: Continue along the path to reach the Lower Capital Church site of grace.

steps.title: Pick Up Lionel's Armor Set and Deathbed Dress
steps.description: On the bed near the grace, find Lionel's Armor Set and a Deathbed Dress.

steps.title: Defeat Omenkiller – Omensmirk Mask
steps.description: Defeat the Omenkiller outside the church for the Omensmirk Mask.

steps.title: Pick Up Erdsteel Dagger
steps.description: Drop down the ladder north, head northwest down the channel. Defeat the sitting Gargoyle, drop into the pit below for the Erdsteel Dagger.

steps.title: Defeat Scarab – Thunderbolt Ash of War
steps.description: (If Not Already Obtained) Climb the ladder on the far side, head south to a secluded area. Defeat the scarab for the Thunderbolt Ash of War.

steps.title: Defeat Gargoyle Miniboss – Gargoyle's Halberd
steps.description: South of the West Capital Ramparts, defeat the Gargoyle miniboss for the Gargoyle's Halberd.

steps.title: Pick Up Cane Sword
steps.description: Find the staircase near the West Ramparts entrance. Turn right at the bottom to find the Cane Sword in a small room.

steps.title: Enter Fortified Manor Upper Level (South Side)
steps.description: Head to the Fortified Manor (resembles Roundtable Hold). Enter via the south side to gain upper level access.

steps.title: Pick Up Sanctified Whetblade
steps.description: In the first couple rooms of the upper level, find the Sanctified Whetblade.

steps.title: Pick Up Hammer
steps.description: Find the Hammer in the upper level rooms.

steps.title: Pick Up 'By My Sword' Gesture
steps.description: Find the 'By My Sword' gesture in the upper level rooms.

steps.title: Pick Up Coded Sword (Two Fingers Room)
steps.description: Open the doors to the room where the Two Fingers would be. Find the Coded Sword inside.

steps.title: Pick Up Seedbed Curse (Dung Eater's Room Equivalent)
steps.description: Head to the spot where Dung Eater would sit. Find another Seedbed Curse.

steps.title: Pick Up Two Fingers' Prayerbook
steps.description: Go down the staircase from the smithing room. Make a sharp left west through the hall. Find the Two Fingers' Prayerbook near a fireplace.

steps.title: Pick Up Alberich's Armor Set
steps.description: In the foyer, head towards the west corner and pick up Alberich's Armor Set along the way.

steps.title: Discover Manor Lower Level Site of Grace
steps.description: Continue to the Manor Lower Level site of grace.

steps.title: 'Flightless Bird' Painting – Fire's Deadly Sin
steps.description: The 'Flightless Bird' painting is near the Fortified Manor grace. View the depicted scene from the peak south of Windmill Heights to get the Fire's Deadly Sin Incantation.

phases.title: Bernahl's Volcano Manor Target – Raging Wolf Armor

steps.title: Invade with Bernahl – Defeat Vargram & Wilhelm
steps.description: Return to the foyer. Use the Red Summoning Sign. Assist Bernahl in defeating Vargram and Wilhelm. Receive the Raging Wolf Armor Set.

steps.title: Report to Bernahl at Volcano Manor – Gelmir's Fury Sorcery
steps.description: Speak with Bernahl at Volcano Manor to receive the Gelmir's Fury Sorcery.

steps.title: Defeat Leyndell Knight – Gravel Stone Seal
steps.description: Northwest of the foyer exit, defeat the spear-and-shield Leyndell Knight for the Gravel Stone Seal (boosts Dragon Cult Incantations).

steps.title: Pick Up Stormhawk Axe
steps.description: Return to the foyer and open the north doors to the courtyard. Find the Stormhawk Axe against the south wall (guarded by Iron Maiden). Grab it.

steps.title: Pick Up Blessed Dew Talisman
steps.description: Take the large lift west. Past the grace, find a chest on the north side (past a dormant golem) containing the Blessed Dew Talisman.

steps.title: Defeat Godfrey, First Elden Lord (Golden Shade)
steps.description: From the West Capital Ramparts, climb giant vines southwest to the Erdtree Sanctuary. Defeat the Golden Shade of Godfrey. Unlocks an additional talisman slot on new game.

steps.title: Discover Erdtree Sanctuary Site of Grace
steps.description: Discover the new site of grace.

steps.title: Pick Up Erdtree Bow
steps.description: Head out east exit, climb vines up. Go north exit, turn left, drop to rooftop, enter through broken window. Find the Erdtree Bow in a chest on the west side.

steps.title: Pick Up Celestial Dew
steps.description: To the south, kick down a ladder. Pick up a Celestial Dew nearby.

steps.title: Pick Up Golden Order Principia Prayerbook
steps.description: Double back toward the broken window. Climb a new vine to reach the Golden Order Principia prayerbook (required for Goldmask's quest).

steps.title: Pick Up Blessing of the Erdtree Incantation
steps.description: Head to the Queen's Bedchamber to find the Blessing of the Erdtree Incantation.

steps.title: Farm Duelists for Armor Set, Greataxe & Battle Hammer
steps.description: (Low Drop Rate) Return to Erdtree Sanctuary, exit south, climb down vines. Head southwest to the Leyndell Coliseum path. Two Duelists can drop Duelist Armor, Duelist Greataxe, and Battle Hammer (low rates). Won't be available after Maliketh.

steps.title: Pick Up Ritual Shield Talisman
steps.description: Near the second Duelist, find the Ritual Shield Talisman.

steps.title: Pick Up Star Fist Weapon
steps.description: Heading clockwise around the Coliseum, find Corhyn and Goldmask. Pick up the Star Fist from a body in a nearby alcove first.

steps.title: Give Corhyn the Golden Order Principia
steps.description: Give Corhyn the Golden Order Principia. If Corhyn is dead, give it to Miriel at the Church of Vows instead.

steps.title: Learn the Law of Regression Incantation
steps.description: Learn the Law of Regression incantation (requires 37 Intelligence — Rebirth may be needed).

steps.title: Memorize Law of Regression and Equip a Seal
steps.description: Return to Erdtree Sanctuary. Memorize Law of Regression and equip your favorite seal.

steps.title: Cast Law of Regression at Radagon Statue
steps.description: Head out the west exit, down the lift. Near the foot of the staircase, find a message before a Radagon statue. Cast Law of Regression.

steps.title: Read the New Message That Appears
steps.description: Read the new message that appears on the ground a short distance ahead.

steps.title: Defeat Invisible Scarab – Barrier of Gold Incantation
steps.description: Run north along the path — gold footsteps of an invisible scarab appear. Chase it past a Crucible Knight (skip the knight). Defeat the scarab for Barrier of Gold.

steps.title: Pick Up Bolt of Gransax)
steps.description: Sprint-jump over the railing northwest near the giant spear. Land on the platform below. Carefully ascend the spear to get the Bolt of Gransax.

steps.title: Rebirth Back to Normal Stats if Needed
steps.description: If you respecced for 37 INT, now is a good time to Rebirth again to restore your original stats.

steps.title: Tell Goldmask Your Revelation – 'Golden Order Totality' Gesture
steps.description: Return to Goldmask and tell him your revelation. Unlock the 'Golden Order Totality' gesture.

steps.title: Corhyn Sells Discus of Light and Immutable Shield
steps.description: If Corhyn is present, he thanks you and sells two new incantations: Discus of Light and Immutable Shield.

steps.title: Defeat Morgott, the Omen King
steps.description: From the Queen's Bedchambers, head to the Elden Throne. You can summon Melina for the fight. Defeat Morgott.

steps.title: Rest at New Grace – Receive Rold Medallion from Melina
steps.description: Attempt to enter the Erdtree, then rest at the new site of grace near Morgott. Receive the Rold Medallion from Melina.

phases.title: Completing Nepheli, Gostoc & Kenneth Haight Quests

steps.title: Return to Fort Haight – Clear Demi-Humans
steps.description: Return to Fort Haight and clear it of demi-humans.

steps.title: Speak with Kenneth Haight at Fort Haight
steps.description: Find Kenneth Haight near the top of the fort. Speak through all dialogue.

steps.title: Rest at Secluded Cell Grace to Trigger NPC Move
steps.description: Fast travel to Godrick the Grafted grace. If Gostoc is still kicking Godrick's body and the Throne Room is empty, rest at the Secluded Cell grace to trigger the move.

steps.title: Speak with Nepheli in Throne Room – Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone
steps.description: Nepheli, Gostoc, and Kenneth should all be in the Throne Room. Speak with Nepheli multiple times for an Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone.

steps.title: Buy Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone from Gostoc (20,000 Runes)
steps.description: Purchase a second Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone from Gostoc for 20,000 runes.

steps.title: Open Northeast Doors on Main Avenue
steps.description: Return to Leyndell. Open the large doors at the northeast end of the main avenue.

steps.title: Pick Up Perfume Bottle (Southeast Water Area)
steps.description: Head along the lower water area. At the southeast edge, pick up another Perfume Bottle (guarded by Misbegotten Warrior).

steps.title: Pick Up Flamedrake Talisman +1
steps.description: Double back and cross the large bridge. Pick up the Flamedrake Talisman +1 along the way.

steps.title: Take Lift Down to Forbidden Lands – Discover Grace
steps.description: Take the second lift down to the Forbidden Lands and discover the site of grace.

steps.title: Pick Up Blade of Calling
steps.description: Take the lift back up. Jump off towards a west alcove shortly after ascending to find the Blade of Calling in a secret room.

steps.title: Travel to Grand Lift of Rold
steps.description: Travel northeast through the Forbidden Lands to the Grand Lift of Rold.

steps.title: Speak with Shabriri (Yura) at Zamor Ruins
steps.description: Head to Zamor Ruins. Find Yura, now possessed by Shabriri. Speak with him about the Three Fingers and Frenzied Flame. Don't attack him yet.

steps.title: Speak with Millicent at Ancient Snow Valley Ruins
steps.description: Continue north to the Ancient Snow Valley Ruins. Speak with Millicent through all dialogue. Reload — she leaves.

steps.title: Invade Juno Hoslow – 'Hoslow's Oath' Gesture
steps.description: Go northeast to the frozen river, travel southwest. Find the Red Summoning Sign near the Shack of the Lofty. Pause after invading to get the 'Hoslow's Oath' gesture.

steps.title: Defeat Juno Hoslow – Hoslow's Armor Set & Petal Whip
steps.description: Defeat Juno Hoslow for the Hoslow's Armor Set and Hoslow's Petal Whip.

steps.title: Speak with Bernahl for Gelmir's Fury
steps.description: (If Not Already) At Volcano Manor, speak with Bernahl for Gelmir's Fury Sorcery if you haven't already.

steps.title: Report Hoslow's Defeat to Tanith – Taker's Cameo
steps.description: Report your success to Tanith. Receive the Taker's Cameo Talisman.

steps.title: Accept Tanith's Offer – Transport to Rykard
steps.description: Accept Tanith's offer to be transported to Volcano Manor's final boss.

steps.title: Pick Up the Serpent-Hunter Weapon
steps.description: Discover the site of grace. Pass through the fog wall. Pick up the Serpent-Hunter to your left — the best weapon for this fight. Optionally fast travel to upgrade it first.

steps.title: Defeat Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy
steps.description: Defeat the God-Devouring Serpent / Rykard. Drops the Remembrance of the Blasphemous and Rykard's Great Rune.

steps.title: Discover Post-Rykard Site of Grace
steps.description: Discover the new site of grace after defeating Rykard.

steps.title: Speak with Tanith, Bernahl, Patches (and Diallos) at Manor
steps.description: Return to Volcano Manor hub. Speak with Tanith, Bernahl, and Patches. Also Diallos if still present.

steps.title: Reload and Confirm All NPCs Have Left
steps.description: Reload the game to confirm all NPCs have left the manor.

steps.title: Pick Up 'My Thanks' Gesture
steps.description: Pick up the 'My Thanks' gesture from where the Ghost NPC was previously located.

steps.title: Return to Rya via Temple of Eiglay Shortcut
steps.description: Travel to Temple of Eiglay. Use the shortcut to reach Rya's location deeper in the manor.

steps.title: Speak with Rya – Refuse to Give Tonic (Best Ending)
steps.description: This is your final chance to give the Tonic. The best ending is to refuse. Speak with Rya and do not give her the Tonic.

steps.title: Reload – Rya Leaves Behind Daedicar's Woe & Zorayas's Letter
steps.description: Reload the game. Rya is gone. Pick up Daedicar's Woe Talisman and Zorayas's Letter.

steps.title: Speak with Patches at Castellan's Hall – Dancer's Castanets
steps.description: Fast travel to Castellan's Hall in the Shaded Castle. Find Patches sat down. Speak through all dialogue to get the Dancer's Castanets. Speak once more, then reload to confirm he leaves.

steps.title: Give Tanith the Dancer's Castanets at Rykard's Room
steps.description: Return to the Rykard boss room. Find Tanith. Give her the Dancer's Castanets (no observable effect yet — likely future content).

steps.title: Don't Attack Tanith (Future Content)
steps.description: Attacking Tanith gives the Consort's Mask but may interfere with future content for Tanith and Patches. Wait until right before New Game+ if you want the mask.

steps.title: Return to Murkwater Cave – Patches Reunion
steps.description: Return to Murkwater Cave (where you first met Patches). After a moment of déjà vu, Patches recognizes you and surrenders.

steps.title: Unlock 'Patches Crouch' Gesture and Permanent Shop
steps.description: This unlocks the 'Patches Crouch' gesture and gives permanent access to Patches' item shop. If this doesn't trigger, restart the game.

steps.title: Do NOT Defeat Fire Giant or Mohg, Lord of Blood
steps.description: Hold off on defeating the Fire Giant and Mohg, Lord of Blood until Part 6.
